passives.name: Spellblade
passives.effects: After using an ability, your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as|100% '''base''' AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]]. If the target is a champion, inflict them with ''Expose Weakness'' for 4 seconds, causing them to take {{rd|8%|5%}} increased damage from all sources ({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

active.name: Ward
active.effects: Consumes a charge to place a {{tip|Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area. Charges refill upon visiting the shop.

effects_structured.raw: After using an ability, your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as 100% '''base''' AD}} {{as '''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]]

If the target is a champion, inflict them with ''Expose Weakness'' for 4 seconds, causing them to take {{rd 8% 5%}} increased damage from all sources ({{fd 1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

modifiers.post_5_minutes_gold_reduction_formula_no: 50% + 1% per minion kill starting from 20 kills, capped at 50 kills

effects_structured.raw: Consumes a charge to place a {{tip Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip sight}} of the surrounding area.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Bloodsong is modeled as a support Spellblade amplifier that marks champion targets to take increased damage after empowered hits.
Ward charges refill upon visiting the shop; charge count and ward duration are not encoded here.

Support-income diminishing minion-gold behavior now encodes page-verified threshold formulas and reduction ranges (pre-5-minutes and post-5-minutes), while exact per-minute windowing and team support-item dynamics remain shared-rule dependencies.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.used_for: page-level verification of Expose Weakness champion-only trigger, melee/ranged split, and support-income diminishing-gold thresholds/reduction curve (before 5 minutes and after 5 minutes)
